strategy.name: FX Swing — Fundamental pre-screen + RSI(14) / SMA(40) / SMA(60) multi-timeframe
strategy.description: Two-stage filter. Stage 1: fundamental conviction score eliminates pairs with no clear macro bias. Stage 2: SMA(40/60) trend alignment across Monthly, Weekly, and Daily confirms direction; RSI(14) on the 4H provides the entry timing signal.

fundamental_prescreen.long_entry: Base currency is Mild Long or Strong Long AND quote is Neutral, Mild Short, or Strong Short
fundamental_prescreen.short_entry: Quote currency is Mild Long or Strong Long AND base is Neutral, Mild Short, or Strong Short

indicators.sma_40: Trend direction. Price above SMA(40) = bullish structure. Below = bearish.
indicators.sma_60: Trend confirmation. SMA(40) above SMA(60) = uptrend intact. Below = downtrend intact.
indicators.rsi_14: Entry timing on 4H only. Below 45 in confirmed uptrend = pullback entry. Above 55 in confirmed downtrend = extension entry.

timeframe_roles.Monthly: Macro trend — must align with fundamental bias
timeframe_roles.Weekly: Intermediate trend — must confirm monthly direction
timeframe_roles.Daily: Short-term trend — must confirm weekly direction
timeframe_roles.4H: Entry timing — RSI(14) pullback or extension signal

long: Monthly: price above SMA(40) and SMA(60), SMA(40) > SMA(60)
Weekly: price above SMA(40) and SMA(60), SMA(40) > SMA(60)
Daily: price above SMA(40) and SMA(60), SMA(40) > SMA(60)
4H: RSI(14) below 45 — pullback in confirmed uptrend
short: Monthly: price below SMA(40) and SMA(60), SMA(40) < SMA(60)
Weekly: price below SMA(40) and SMA(60), SMA(40) < SMA(60)
Daily: price below SMA(40) and SMA(60), SMA(40) < SMA(60)
4H: RSI(14) above 55 — extension in confirmed downtrend

exit_rules: Take profit at next major SMA on the daily (SMA(40) for longs, SMA(40) for shorts)
Trail stop below/above the weekly SMA(40) once trade is in profit
Hard stop: 1% below entry for longs, 1% above entry for shorts (overridden by broker stop order)
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade (set via RISK_PER_TRADE in .env)
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Paper trade first — run at least 2 weeks of paper signals before going live
notes: Swing / position trading strategy. Designed for 4H entry on weekly/monthly trend structures. Do not trade EM pairs (NOK, SEK, DKK, PLN, HUF, SGD, MXN, CNH) without verifying broker liquidity and spread first. Fundamental scores must be refreshed at minimum weekly.
